title: High-Density Diffuse Optical Tomography Audiovisual Movie Viewing Dataset

affiliations.name: Mallinckrodt Institute of Radiology Washington University School of Medicine  St. Louis Missouri USA
Imaging Science Program Washington University in St. Louis  St. Louis Missouri USA

description: High-density diffuse optical tomography (HD-DOT) dataset acquired from 5 participants during functional localizer and naturalistic movie viewing tasks. The dataset includes SNIRF-formatted optical neuroimaging data with subject-specific head models, optode positions, and anatomical landmarks. This resource supports investigation of brain function during naturalistic audiovisual stimulation using non-invasive optical imaging.
methods_description: Functional neuroimaging data were collected using high-density diffuse optical tomography during functional localizer tasks and movie viewing. Data are provided in SNIRF format with optode and landmark locations registered to subject-specific head models.
